author: ken wylie
body:
Dallas

I enjoy your wrk because it make me reflect on life and myself. Your use of metaphor and questions in your lyrics is brilliant. In a society where we are spoonfed everything you respect your listeners enough to not give them the answers to the questions you ask or the observations you make. This gives your work depth and uncertainty. It therefore reflects life most clearly.

What makes a man?

Walk away from his mind?  
Live his whole life in disguise?  
Break a heart with ease?

Many things. For me it is fear.

Ken
